title: neolitsea levinei
intro: Neolitsea levinei, also known as the Chinese boxwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to China and Taiwan. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues. Neolitsea levinei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
